query: We need 5 social media images for our product launch. They all need to look like they came from the same brand.
expected_behavior: Asks for or proposes a consistent seed, style token, or reference image to lock visual consistency
Produces 5 structured prompts — one per image — each referencing the same style anchors
Specifies the aspect ratio appropriate for each social platform (e.g. 1:1 for Instagram, 16:9 for Twitter)
Documents the shared style parameters so the series can be extended later
Does not produce 5 independent prompts with no cross-referencing
